insight: Mannequin bosses (vanilla 1.21.9+ decoration entity) cannot have AI. Boss routes them to native backend with `setImmovable(true)` and the AI & Behavior menu is locked out (`canRunAI = !BossAI.isMannequin(boss)` in SettingsMenu). No Citizens.Goal_Target_* setting will make them hostile. For humanoid hostile mobs, use a PLAYER boss via Citizens instead.
